title: circaea × ovata
intro: Circaea × ovata, also known as the Enchanter's Nightshade or Enchanter's Violet, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the evening primrose family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Circaea × ovata include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve skin health, as well as its ability to act as a natural antiseptic and antimicrobial agent. In herbal preparations, Circaea × ovata is often used in teas, infusions, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
intro_study: According to Phytotherapy research : PTR, circaea × ovata, which is also known as red clover, may have positive effects on symptoms of knee osteoarthritis such as pain and function, and can be considered as a complementary treatment.
